reviews.review_title: This game is so good that…..
reviews.review_description:
I GET HOME AND PLAY THIS EVERY DAYYYYYYY :D one time I got home to play this fat baby game and I started playing it in my bath room and I shat all over :L this is the most skibidi schoolboy09 game I have EVER played! Thank you -Diddy 

UPDATE! 
I found out how to become one with the babbys!!!! I can finally go out in public dressed as my true self! This game helped me become what I am today, A baby furry!!

it made me feel like a baby covered in poo 😱
they should make a horror game outta this
one of the babys sat on me, and then when my friend played, he got the same thing happen to him and he screamed "GYAAAAAAATTTTT" so loud he became one with the baby.
When I see poopoo and peepee it make me happy and baby is cool when walk

It was such a fun game that I busted all over my floor, and my dad walked in because I was moaning a lot. Baby tag was so fun that I'm now in the adoption center writing this review because my dad went to get milk, and my mom jumped off a roof. Idk why tho.. I can't stop playing this game. Everytime I'm forced to get off the game I start climbing walls and pooping my pants as if I'm playing the game. 10/10 would recommend 

PS- MY floor is NOT ok.
I died and i took off my headset and. I see all the babys pooing all over my carpet
Would recommend I screamed so loud everyone in my street called 911 and there was 1000 cop cars trying to look for me and my dad got arrested. would recommend😍

This is so god dam scary I saw a baby trying to eat my foot and why he smiling the hole god dam time 😰😰😰😰😰😰 like if your gonna eat my foot at least enjoy it 😰🥲🥲🥲😥😥😥😥😥😨🫣🫣 I tried
 to hide in a box but then he found me…
I let my 4 year old son get the game because he wanted it and he got off the game and started crying saying ‘’it was to scary’’ and ‘’there was to much fatty bum bum poo poos’’ never again
A baby was covered in poo trying to eat my hand and farting on me THERE SO FAT

reviews.review_title: He developers just re-comment on this
reviews.review_description:
So this is a great game I stop playing it for a little while and then I join back in which is still a great game But tell me when you’re gonna release Multiplayer￼ and new maps please tell me developers😞🪥￼
































Developers please tell me or else I will tell how good this game is😎

developer_response.body:
hi! thank you so much for being so interested in our game and giving us five stars! : D 
our multiplayer mode is still under development and it still needs some time. but the good news is, we have hired a new dev and she is making new maps now! about the new map, it might be finished within 2 or 3 weeks, or earlier. thank you so much for your concern. hope you enjoy our game : D

reviews.review_description: This is a good game, it's scary, fun, and terrifying (even tho its babies) But It's still good to play in your free time.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback and support! so glad that you like our game : D

developer_response.body: Yeah, baby tag is kind of scary and creepy. lol.Glad you are having fun and thank you for playing.  :D

reviews.review_description: I thought I would find my new favorite game but the moving is too difficult and it is very scary like when I was beating a baby one jumped out behind me and tagged me

developer_response.body:
hey! we'd love to help make your experience with baby tag better! about movement, this is also what we hope to improve. maybe you could try sliding on the floor(raise one hand and crawl on the floor with the other one), this is the best and fastest movement in the baby tag. and baby tag is really scary, i feel intense and scared every time i played it. maybe you will feel better once we update the multiplayer mode and you can play it with your friends! we are working on multiplayer mode and new maps right now. 
Hope my answer could answer your questions. if not, please shoot me an email at feedback@gameday.tech or reach out on our Discord and we'll see if we can get this fixed!  https://discord.gg/dCuTe7zWwx 
My discord account is Valentina.#9924 you can ping me or DM me on the server and i would be glad to help you! hope to see you soon :D

reviews.review_description: If it had multiplayer be much more funner but I still love the game

developer_response.body:
thanks for playing baby tag! we are working on multiplayer mode and it is our top priority now! thanks for your feedback and we will work harder! 
here is our multiplayer mode plan!: 
- add multiplayer rooms, players can randomly join them and play with other players. 8 （or 16） players can join the same room at the same time, and one player will be the "enemy baby" at the beginning and he needs to tag all the other babies. 
in the future:
- add specific rooms. players can create their own room and their friends can join the room by the room code. 
- add new maps.
- add cosmetic
and you can catch the latest update on our server: discord.gg/babytag 
hope you can enjoy our game:D

reviews.review_description: So we are spider man now bany tag babies can not climb not even talking now about one room

developer_response.body:
hi we'd love to help make your experience with baby tag better! Thank you for playing our game! you can climb on the walls and ceiling by tagging the grip button. and you can even slide on the floor! you can have more details in our tutorial video on the start menu.
we are not an online game now so you can not talk yet. we are so sorry about that. and we are now working our best to make the multiplayer mode right now! and after that, we will make more rooms! 
thanks for your review, we will work even harder!  if you have any ideas please reach out on our Discord https://discord.gg/dCuTe7zWwx! we are all ears about that! thank you and hope you can give us another review after our updates :D

reviews.review_description: For an app lab game, it is polished and great, I am currently number one in the world, it was so fun to grind to get there.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We are so glad that you can enjoy the game! that's super cool and awesome to be NO.1 in the world!   if it is not so troublesome for you maybe you could share some skills or the video that you play baby tag for us. here is my discord account if you need it.  Valentina.#9924, or you can find me on the discord server: https://discord.gg/SY33MjwvrB, i am Valentina, the server manager! Thank you so much!

reviews.review_description: Please let my family free.....

developer_response.body:
Imao, did you keep screaming when you play baby tag? lol. i did, bro. i always scream and feel scared every time when i play baby tag. so my favorite part in the game is to throw things at those creepy babies! 
anyway, so sorry for making you have such a terrible experience in baby tag. we are working on multiplayer rn, so would you feel better if i play with you in multiplayer mode? that would be so fun if we can scream together! 
and would you possibly give us more stars if we hang out in the game? 
please contact me if you need any help. my discord account is Valentina_BabyTag#9924, or you can contact me on baby tag server. you can search baby tag on discord directly. 
hope you have a nice day!  :D

reviews.review_description: The movement is slow and often flings you backwards, the hits don't register sometimes, and I get caught on props because I end up grabbing them instead of going over them.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our game! :)
about the movement, you might grab the floor automatically so sometimes you will move forward and backward. you can move much faster if you try sliding on the floor ( raising one hand and crawling on the floor with another hand). the props can be grabbed by your hand and thrown at those babies, and they will stop chasing you when you hit them.
we're all ears if you have any ideas about our game!  Hope my answer could answer your questions.  if not, please shoot me an email at feedback@gameday.tech or reach out on our Discord and we'll see if we can get this fixed!  https://discord.gg/dCuTe7zWwx
thank you so much for your feedback! hope you can enjoy our game next time :D

reviews.review_description: This game is a phenomenal, deserving goty but there’s only one issue that could be easily fixed and it’s adding multiplayer to the game I would love to tag my friends as a mucus covered baby.

developer_response.body: thank you so much for giving us such a high commendation! :D we are now trying our best to work on multiplayer mode! and we will update our game ASAP! thank you again and hope you enjoy our game :)

reviews.review_description:
It’s so bad I hate it￼ I literally don’t even know how to play but if I can hit a sock at a baby
￼

developer_response.body: hey! thank you for playing our game and we'd love to help make your experience with baby tag better!:)  Baby Tag is a tag game and all the other babies will come after you and try to tag you. Throw a sock at babies can make them cry and stop chasing you. that's a good try. : D The current scheme of the baby tag may not be intuitive enough. Therefore, we put a description video on the blackboard on the left of the start scene. hopefully, the video will be helpful to you and you can enjoy playing baby tag later. Hope my answer could answer your questions. If not, please shoot me an email at feedback@gameday.tech or reach out on our Discord and we'll see if we can get this fixed!  https://discord.gg/dCuTe7zWwx

reviews.review_description: Fr can't even play it.

developer_response.body:
hey! we'd love to help make your experience with baby tag better! May i know what you mean you can't play it? is it you will get stuck on the floor and can not move? if so, please try not to grab the floor or crawl on the floor with two hands at the same time. you can try to slide on the floor and it is the fastest way to move in the baby tag. by sliding on the floor, you can crawl with only one hand, while the other hand is away from the floor. 
hope my answer would be helpful to your problem. and we are all ears if you have any ideas or suggestions! And please shoot me an email at feedback@gameday.tech or reach out on our Discord and we'll see if we can get this fixed!  https://discord.gg/babytag

developer_response.body:
thank you so much for playing baby tag and giving us five stars! I suck at it too lol, it is fine. you might find it easier to play if you try sliding( Slide on the floor with one hand while the other hand stays away from it)
hope you enjoy the game : D
